page_metadata.biotools__summary: DeepOlf is a deep neural network-based prediction model, developed on a large dataset of odorants, non-odorants and olfactory receptors (ORs), using a potential set of physiochemical properties and molecular fingerprints. It allows accurate inference of an odorant over a set of olfactory receptors.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DeepOlf is a deep neural network-based prediction model, developed on a large dataset of odorants, non-odorants and olfactory receptors (ORs), using a potential set of physiochemical properties and molecular fingerprints.
